title: Attestor Financial Reporting Acceptance Packet
headline: Accepted with fully verifiable proof
summary: Attestor produced a PASS decision for an AI-assisted financial reporting workflow and issued a portable proof kit. The packet can be re-verified outside the platform, and this run shows hybrid with sqlite. The current verification verdict is verified.

verificationChecks.label: Governance sufficiency
verificationChecks.detail: SQL, policy, and guardrails all passed for decision pass.

verificationChecks.label: Authority closure
verificationChecks.detail: Warrant, escrow, and receipt reached an authorized state.

verificationChecks.label: Reviewer endorsement
verificationChecks.detail: Reviewer endorsement verified for Attestor Live Reviewer.

verificationChecks.label: Execution context evidence
verificationChecks.detail: No database execution-context hash is present in the proof bundle.

keyTakeaways: The run shows an AI-assisted financial reporting acceptance flow, not just a raw model response.
The run emitted certificate cert_cd5a662e2df8b93e and a portable verification kit that can be checked without API access.
The evidence chain contains 11 audit entries and is intact.
Execution was live and recorded against sqlite.
The packet includes a verified reviewer endorsement for Attestor Live Reviewer.
limitations: No schema attestation file was captured for this run.

artifactFiles.label: Verification kit
artifactFiles.description: Portable proof bundle with certificate, authority bundle, and verification summary.

artifactFiles.label: Certificate
artifactFiles.description: Ed25519-signed attestation certificate for the governed run.

artifactFiles.label: Signer public key
artifactFiles.description: Public key needed to independently verify the certificate signature.

artifactFiles.label: Reviewer public key
artifactFiles.description: Public key needed to independently verify the reviewer endorsement.

artifactFiles.label: Verification summary
artifactFiles.description: The six-dimensional verification verdict emitted for this packet.

artifactFiles.label: Trust chain
artifactFiles.description: PKI trust chain for the runtime signer used by this proof packet.

artifactFiles.label: CA public key
artifactFiles.description: CA public key used to verify the runtime signer leaf certificate.
